title: Ventura County agricultural building — county-specific exemptions, out of pilot
notes: Ag-zoned utility/storage structure. County overlays + CBC §312 — exemption logic not in pilot.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 5640 BARDSDALE AVE, VENTURA COUNTY UNINCORPORATED
ZONING: A-E (Agricultural Exclusive)
Proposed: agricultural storage building (open space agricultural overlay)
Occupancy Group: U (utility/misc, CBC §312)
Construction Type: II-B
Building area: 4,800 sf
Number of stories: 1
Height: 22 ft
Agricultural building exemption claimed per Ventura County Title 8 / CBC §312
